name: Shola Flower Filler Cream - Threshold™: Decorative Vase & Bowl Accents, Spring Summer Decor
description:
Add a natural floral touch to your decor with this 15-Piece Shola Flower Filler in Cream from Threshold™. This pack of decorative filler makes a great addition to your decor, lending added interest to bowls, baskets, broad vases and more. It includes several different types of wood shola flowers for a textured look with natural appeal, while its light cream shade blends effortlessly with a range of color schemes. Place this decorative vase filler on entryway consoles, bookshelves, coffee tables or anywhere else you please for a light and bright floral decor accent.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
